problem: Bob can shuck 10 oysters in 5 minutes.  How many oysters can he shuck in 2 hours?
Alice can pick 12 apples in 3 minutes.  How many apples can Alice pick in 9 minutes?
Tom can type 80 words in 2 minutes.  How many words can Tom type in 10 minutes?
Maya can paint 6 walls in 3 hours.  How many walls can Maya paint in 9 hours?
Sam can pack 15 boxes in 5 minutes.  How many boxes can Sam pack in 2 hours?
Jade can read 20 pages in 10 minutes.  How many pages can Jade read in 3 hours?
Leo can score 4 goals in 60 seconds.  How many goals can Leo score in 5 minutes?
Finn can write 3 essays in 1 hour.  How many essays can Finn write in 4 hours?
Bob can shuck 10 oysters in 5 minutes.  How many oysters can he shuck in 30 minutes?
Alice can complete 8 tasks in 2 hours.  How many tasks can she complete in 6 hours?
Sam can produce 20 widgets in 4 minutes.  How many widgets can he produce in 12 minutes?
Maya can answer 15 questions in 5 minutes.  How many questions can she answer in 20 minutes?
Tina makes $18.00 an hour.  How much money does Tina make in 5 hours?
Bob earns $25.00 per hour.  How much money does Bob earn in 8 hours?
Alice receives $12.50 per hour.  How much money does Alice receive in 4 hours?
Sam charges $30.00 per hour.  How much money does Sam charge in 3 hours?
Bob can juggle 10 balls in 5 minutes.  How many balls can Bob juggle in 30 minutes?
Alice can knit 3 scarves in 2 hours.  How many scarves can Alice knit in 6 hours?
Tom can solve 5 puzzles in 10 minutes.  How many puzzles can Tom solve in 30 minutes?
Maya can bake 4 cakes in 1 hour.  How many cakes can Maya bake in 3 hours?
